summary: Short but stellar half‑hour show captured on a soundboard recording of good quality
review: Reviewers rave about this roughly 30‑minute segment as one of the best halves of Dead ever, noting its tight flow and impressive segues. No specific technical complaints appear, and the .sbd tag suggests a clean soundboard source.

ai_rating.rationale: Four reviews (three 4‑5 stars) praise the musical performance; no recording issues are reported, yielding a high overall rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No explicit comments on sound quality; reviewers gave high ratings and the .sbd tag implies a clear board mix.

show_quality.setlist_flow: A concise, high‑energy half set (~30 min) with many classic segues (e.g., China Cat Sunflower → I Know You Rider, St. Stephen → Not Fade Away → St. Stephen) that keeps the momentum tight.
